summary: Completed testing of UI improvements, gate control access for accountant, and mobile-friendly layouts. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - Finance & GST, Purchase Register, Gate Control pages load correctly with dark theme and back buttons. Gate Control accessible by accountant with custom courier input. Mobile-friendly layouts verified for Gate Control, Technician Dashboard, and Supervisor Dashboard.
critical_code_review_comments: Finance & GST page correctly uses DashboardLayout with dark theme (slate-800 background)
Purchase Register page correctly uses DashboardLayout with dark theme and back button
Gate Control page is accessible by accountant role - verified via API and UI
Custom courier input appears when 'Other' is selected in Gate Control
Tracking input supports barcode scanner (Enter key triggers scan via onKeyDown handler)
Gate Control mobile view has large buttons (56px height - h-14 class)
Technician Dashboard has 2-column stats grid on mobile (grid-cols-2)
Supervisor Dashboard has 2-column stats grid on mobile (grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4)
Accountant User Manual exists at /app/ACCOUNTANT_USER_MANUAL.md with comprehensive content including Gate Control and Barcode Scanner sections
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 34 are working correctly. Finance & GST at /finance, Purchase Register at /accountant/purchases, Gate Control at /gate (accessible by accountant, gate, dispatcher, admin roles). Mobile-friendly layouts verified at 375x812 viewport. Gate Control has large buttons (h-14 = 56px), tracking input supports barcode scanner via Enter key. Custom courier input appears when 'Other' is selected. Technician Dashboard at /technician has 2-column stats grid on mobile. Supervisor Dashboard at /supervisor has 2-column stats grid on mobile.
features_tested: Finance & GST page loads with DashboardLayout, Back button, and dark theme
Purchase Register page loads with DashboardLayout, Back button, and dark theme
Gate Control page is accessible by accountant role (API and UI verified)
Gate Control shows custom courier name input when 'Other' is selected
Gate Control tracking input supports barcode scanner (Enter key triggers scan)
Gate Control page is mobile-friendly (56px height buttons, responsive layout)
Technician Dashboard is mobile-friendly with 2-column stats grid
Supervisor Dashboard is mobile-friendly with 2-column stats grid
Accountant User Manual file exists at /app/ACCOUNTANT_USER_MANUAL.md
API: POST /api/gate/scan works for accountant role
API: GET /api/gate/scheduled works for accountant role
API: GET /api/gate/logs works for accountant role
